title: Dead Code, Unused Dependencies, and Reachability
description: Remove unreachable code and dependencies with evidence rather than guesswork. Learners cumulatively produce a dead-code and dependency audit through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Treat unused imports, variables, parameters, private members, and exports according to language semantics.
Detect unreachable branches, impossible states, and obsolete feature paths.
Detect unused, missing, duplicate, and undeclared dependencies.
